hero.label: AI-Powered Influencer Platform
hero.description: InfluencIA connects brands with nano and micro-influencers through AI-powered matching, real-time scoring, and automated campaign management. No minimum follower count required.

howItWorks.label: Simple process
howItWorks.title: Two paths, one platform
howItWorks.description: Whether you're a brand launching a campaign or a creator building a career, InfluencIA has a clear path for you.

steps.title: Create your campaign
steps.desc: Set your brief, target audience, platform, budget, and content guidelines — in under 10 minutes.

steps.title: AI suggests matched creators
steps.desc: Our IA Score engine analyzes 50+ signals to recommend creators who truly fit your brand.

steps.title: Approve, brief, and launch
steps.desc: Send contracts, share briefs, and manage the full collaboration from one dashboard.

steps.title: Track real results
steps.desc: Monitor reach, engagement, ROI, and content performance with live analytics.

steps.title: Build your creator profile
steps.desc: Link your social accounts, add your niche, and let the AI calculate your IA Score.

steps.title: Get discovered by brands
steps.desc: Your score and profile are shown to relevant brands. No outreach needed — they come to you.

steps.title: Apply and collaborate
steps.desc: Browse matching campaigns, submit proposals, and manage briefs directly in the platform.

steps.title: Get paid securely
steps.desc: Milestone-based payments are held in escrow and released automatically upon content approval.

features.label: Platform features
features.title: Everything you need to run great campaigns
features.description: Built for modern influencer marketing — from discovery to payment, in one place.

f1.title: IA Score Engine
f1.desc: Every creator gets a real-time composite score based on engagement, audience authenticity, niche alignment, and past campaign history.

f2.title: AI Campaign Matching
f2.desc: Our engine analyzes your brief and ranks creators by predicted fit — audience demographics, tone, and niche alignment included.

f3.title: Campaign Hub
f3.desc: Brief management, content approval, revision threads, and go-live scheduling — every campaign workflow in one place.

f4.title: Escrow Payments
f4.desc: Milestone-based escrow protects both sides. Funds are released automatically when content is approved — no invoice chasing.

f5.title: Performance Analytics
f5.desc: Track impressions, reach, engagement, and ROI per creator and per post. Export reports for stakeholders in one click.

f6.title: Verified Profiles
f6.desc: All accounts are verified via OAuth. Audience data is pulled directly from platform APIs — no fake followers, no inflated numbers.

nanoMicro.label: Nano & micro creators
nanoMicro.title: Small audience, massive impact
nanoMicro.description: Nano influencers (1K–10K) and micro influencers (10K–100K) consistently outperform mega-influencers on engagement and trust. We built InfluencIA around this insight from day one.
points: 3–8% average engagement rate vs 1–2% for celebrities
Audiences that are niche, loyal, and genuinely engaged
76% of consumers trust nano influencer recommendations
Up to 6× better cost-per-engagement than macro creators

stats.label: Platform numbers
stats.title: Built for scale. Trusted by results.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Start for free. Upgrade when you're ready.

starter.desc: Perfect for creators and small brands getting started.

growth.desc: For growing brands ready to scale their influencer program.

enterprise.desc: For agencies and large brands managing multiple campaigns.

finalCta.title: Ready to run smarter campaigns?
finalCta.description: Join 2,500+ brands and 12,000+ creators already using InfluencIA to build authentic partnerships that deliver real ROI.
